reason: Step-001 strengthens rather than weakens the active branch. It freezes one admissible intrinsic object (Mu_S), the exact helical support search class, recursive closure and admissible-enlargement rules, and the quantitative delayed-transfer metrics, and it ends with the explicit verdict that Chain Step 2 is well posed.
